alt: A social group of hoatzins perching together in the high canopy of Manu National Park
caption: Hoatzins are highly social birds that live and nest in collaborative family colonies along riverbanks.
attributionText: Photo by Patty Ho from Toronto, Canada via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
attributionHtml: Photo by Patty Ho from Toronto, Canada via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
acquisitionNotes: Curated group specimen depicting social bonding and colony roosting. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/2b/Opisthocomus_hoazin_-Manu_National_Park%2C_Peru-8_%282%29.jpg
